_comment: DO NOT EDIT — managed by Priya Bot project. Import this file in Pterodactyl: Admin → Nests → Import Egg.
name: Priya Bot
author: priya-bot@example.com
description: Priya — AI Discord bot with built-in owner dashboard. Uses pre-built files — starts in seconds, no pnpm/build step needed.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Pterodactyl install script for Priya Bot
# Pre-built files are in the repo — just clone and go!
set -e

apt-get update -y -q
apt-get install -y -q curl git

# Clone or update the repo
if [ -d /mnt/server/.git ]; then
  echo "Updating repo..."
  cd /mnt/server && git pull
else
  echo "Cloning repo..."
  git clone "${GIT_REPO_URL}" /mnt/server
  cd /mnt/server
  [ -n "${GIT_BRANCH}" ] && git checkout "${GIT_BRANCH}"
fi

# Create .env from example if missing
if [ ! -f /mnt/server/.env ]; then
  cp /mnt/server/.env.example /mnt/server/.env
  echo ""
  echo "=========================================================="
  echo " .env created! Edit /mnt/server/.env before starting!"
  echo "=========================================================="
fi

echo "Install complete. Edit .env then Start the server."

variables.name: MongoDB URI
variables.description: MongoDB connection string. Free cluster at mongodb.com/atlas.

variables.name: Owner Discord ID
variables.description: Your Discord user ID (for owner dashboard features).

variables.name: Dashboard Password
variables.description: Password to log into the owner dashboard.

variables.name: Session Secret
variables.description: Random secret for JWT tokens. Generate: openssl rand -hex 32

variables.name: Git Repository URL
variables.description: Your GitHub/GitLab repo URL to clone during install.

variables.name: Git Branch
variables.description: Branch to use (leave blank for default branch).
